mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_inventory WHERE deleted = 0
AND (drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR location_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

sql.if: AND (i.drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.location_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

choose.when: AND NOT ( COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(d.approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' )
AND ( COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(d.approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.drug_id, i.drug_code, i.drug_name, i.location_no, i.batch_no, i.category, CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(d.approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' ) THEN '中药' ELSE '西/成药' END AS prescription_category, i.specification, i.dosage_form, i.manufacturer, i.quantity, i.unit, i.purchase_amount, i.retail_amount, i.expire_date, i.warning_stock, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.deleted FROM clinic_inventory i LEFT JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = i.drug_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0
ORDER BY i.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_inventory i LEFT JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = i.drug_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(purchase_amount), 0) AS purchaseAmount, COALESCE(SUM(retail_amount), 0) AS retailAmount FROM clinic_inventory WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.drug_id, i.drug_code, i.drug_name, i.location_no, i.batch_no, i.category, CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(d.category, i.category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(d.approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' ) THEN '中药' ELSE '西/成药' END AS prescription_category, i.specification, i.dosage_form, i.manufacturer, i.quantity, i.unit, i.purchase_amount, i.retail_amount, i.expire_date, i.warning_stock, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.deleted FROM clinic_inventory i LEFT JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = i.drug_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.drug_id, i.drug_code, i.drug_name, i.location_no, i.batch_no, i.category, i.specification, i.dosage_form, i.manufacturer, i.quantity, i.unit, i.purchase_amount, i.retail_amount, i.expire_date, i.warning_stock, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.deleted FROM clinic_inventory i LEFT JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = #{drugId} AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND ( i.drug_id = #{drugId} OR ((i.drug_id IS NULL OR i.drug_id = 0) AND d.drug_code IS NOT NULL AND i.drug_code = d.drug_code) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN expire_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, expire_date ASC, id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.drug_id, i.drug_code, i.drug_name, i.location_no, i.batch_no, i.category, i.specification, i.dosage_form, i.manufacturer, i.quantity, i.unit, i.purchase_amount, i.retail_amount, i.expire_date, i.warning_stock, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.deleted FROM clinic_inventory i LEFT JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.drug_code = #{drugCode} AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND ( i.drug_code = #{drugCode} OR (d.id IS NOT NULL AND i.drug_id = d.id) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.expire_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, i.expire_date ASC, i.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_inventory (drug_id, drug_code, drug_name, location_no, batch_no, category, specification, dosage_form, manufacturer, quantity, unit, purchase_amount, retail_amount, expire_date, warning_stock, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{drugId}, #{drugCode}, #{drugName}, #{locationNo}, #{batchNo}, #{category}, #{specification}, #{dosageForm}, #{manufacturer}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{purchaseAmount}, #{retailAmount}, #{expireDate}, #{warningStock}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_inventory
drug_id = #{drugId}, drug_code = #{drugCode}, drug_name = #{drugName}, location_no = #{locationNo}, batch_no = #{batchNo}, category = #{category}, specification = #{specification}, dosage_form = #{dosageForm}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, quantity = #{quantity}, unit = #{unit}, purchase_amount = #{purchaseAmount}, retail_amount = #{retailAmount}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, warning_stock = #{warningStock}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
